<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.put(packet_id);
        stream.put(hexi::prefixed<4>(username));
        stream.put(hexi::prefixed<4>(scores));
        stream.put(hexi::null_terminated(metadata));
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return { reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(buffer.read_ptr()), buffer.size() };
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <span>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    auto stream = block_allocator<>::allocate();
    no_throw_t no_throw {};
    fstream file_buffer(stream, buffer.data(), buffer.size(), no_throw);

    NetworkPacket np;

    // Read packet_id (4 bytes, little-endian)
    file_buffer.get(&np.packet_id, sizeof(np.packet_id));
    endian::le_to_native(np.packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    std::string username;
    file_buffer.get(prefixed<4>(username));
    np.username = std::move(username);

    // Read score count (4 bytes, little-endian)
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    file_buffer.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    endian::le_to_native(score_count);

    // Read scores vector using read_container
    np.scores.resize_and_overwrite(score_count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        *size = score_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
        return true;
    }, no_throw);
    file_buffer.get_container(np.scores);

    // Read metadata as null-terminated string
    np.metadata.clear(); // Clear in case an error occurs
    file_buffer.get(null_terminated(np.metadata));

    // Skip remaining padding
    const auto bytes_read = file_buffer.total_read();
    const auto padding = buffer.size() - bytes_read;
    if(padding > 0) {
        file_buffer.skip(padding);
    }

    block_allocator<>::deallocate(stream);
    return np;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    auto stream = block_allocator<>::allocate();
    no_throw_t no_throw {};
    fstream file_buffer(stream, buffer.data(), buffer.size(), no_throw);

    PacketInfo pi;

    // Get packet_id via span (first 4 bytes)
    const auto packet_id_span = buffer->span(0, 4);
    pi.packet_id = 0; // Initialize in case an error occurs
    memcpy(&pi.packet_id, packet_id_span.data(), 4);
    endian::le_to_native(pi.packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix using string_view
    std::string_view username;
    file_buffer.get(prefixed<4>(username));
    pi.username = username;

    // Read score count and skip scores data
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    file_buffer.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    endian::le_to_native(score_count);
    file_buffer.skip(score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    block_allocator<>::deallocate(stream);
    return pi;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    MessageHeader header{};
    
    // Validate buffer has at least the fixed header data
    if (buffer.size() < 6) { // 2 (type) + 4 (length)
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small to read header"));
    }
    
    // Read message type with endian conversion
    memcpy(&header.message_type, buffer.data() + 0, sizeof(header.message_type));
    header.message_type = hexi::endian::le_to_native<endian::little, endian::native>(header.message_type);
    
    // Read body length with endian conversion
    memcpy(&header.body_length, buffer.data() + 2, sizeof(header.body_length));
    header.body_length = hexi::endian::le_to_native<endian::little, endian::native>(header.body_length);
    
    // Validate buffer has complete data including body and footer
    const auto min_req_size = 6 + header.body_length + 4; // header + body + footer
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun: insufficient data to read complete message"));
    }
    
    // Skip body data (no need to access it, just ensure buffer has enough content)
    
    // Read footer with endian conversion
    memcpy(&header.footer, buffer.data() + 6 + header.body_length, sizeof(header.footer));
    header.footer = hexi::endian::le_to_native<endian::little, endian::native>(header.footer);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

struct PacketHeader {

    uint16_t packet_id;
};

PacketHeader read_packet_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {

    auto pos = buffer.find_first_of(std::byte{0});

        return { str, buffer.size() };
    } else {
        return { str, pos };
    }
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

std::vector<uint32_t> read_item_batch(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    hexi::read(&item_count, buffer.data(), sizeof(item_count));

    hexi::read_container(result.data(), item_count, buffer.data() + sizeof(item_count), item_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_buffer_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer_adaptor(source_buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    buffer_adaptor.read(destination.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return destination;
}

void write_buffer_data(std::vector<uint8_t>& dest_buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& source_data) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer_adaptor(dest_buffer);
    buffer_adaptor.write(source_data.data(), source_data.size());
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.readable_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - buffer.size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    DataResult result;
    result.data_type = buffer[0]; // Preview data_type without advancing the stream

    // Ensure buffer has at least the header (data_type + item_count)
    if (buffer.size() < 5) {
        return result; // Handle error as needed
    }

    // Create a buffer adaptor starting after data_type to read item_count and items
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const std::span<const uint8_t> > buffer_read(buffer.subspan(1));
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_read);

    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le(item_count); // Read item_count in little-endian

    // Calculate minimum required buffer size
    const auto min_req_size = 5 + (result.data_type == 0 ? item_count * sizeof(uint32_t) : item_count * sizeof(float));
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        return result; // Handle error as needed
    }

    // Read items based on data_type
    if (result.data_type == 0) {
        result.int_items.resize_and_overwrite(item_count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
            return size;
        });
        stream.get(result.int_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(uint32_t));
        hexi::endian::le_to_native(result.int_items.data(), item_count);
    } else {
        result.float_items.resize_and_overwrite(item_count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
            return size;
        });
        stream.get(result.float_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(float));
        hexi::endian::le_to_native(result.float_items.data(), item_count);
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    const auto min_req_size = sizeof(header) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        return false;
    }

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer_adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_adaptor);

    stream.put(&header, sizeof(header));
    stream.put_container(items);
    
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    constexpr auto header_size = sizeof(PacketHeader);
    if (buffer.size() < header_size) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small to read header!"));
    }

    hexi::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), header_size);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    PacketHeader header{};
    stream >> header;

    // Convert from little-endian to native byte order
    header.magic = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.magic);
    header.version = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.version);
    header.flags = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.flags);

    return header;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    if (buffer.size() < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        return { 0, "" };
    }

    uint32_t header = 0;
    {
        hexi::buffer_adaptor< const uint8_t > adaptor(buffer);
        adaptor.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    }

    const auto remaining = buffer.size() - sizeof(header);
    if (remaining < 0) {
        return { header, "" };
    }

    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor.data() + sizeof(header), remaining);
    const auto data_ptr = stream.view();
    if (!data_ptr) {
        return { header, "" };
    }

    std::string_view sv(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data_ptr), remaining);
    const auto pos = sv.find_first_of('\0');

    std::string_view message;
    if (pos != sv.npos) {
        message = sv.substr(0, pos);
    } else {
        message = sv;
    }

    return { header, message };
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    hexi::block_allocator<int, element_count> allocator;

    // Initial allocation: 3 elements taken from the free list (now 7 left)
    int* a1 = allocator.allocate();
    int* a2 = allocator.allocate();
    int* a3 = allocator.allocate();

    // Deallocate one element, pushing it back to the head of the free list (now 8 left)
    allocator.deallocate(a3);

    // Subsequent allocation reuses the deallocated block (LIFO behavior)
    int* a4 = allocator.allocate();  // Reuses a3's memory

    // Deallocate remaining allocated blocks (push to free list)
    allocator.deallocate(a1);
    allocator.deallocate(a2);

    // Further allocations reuse the previously deallocated blocks in reverse order
    int* a5 = allocator.allocate();  // Reuses a2's memory
    int* a6 = allocator.allocate();  // Reuses a1's memory
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<typename T>
T convert_to_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_to_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_little(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::little_to_native(value);
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    const auto read_len = storage.read_limit();
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_preview);
    const size_t copy_size = read_len < bytes_to_preview ? read_len : bytes_to_preview;
    memcpy(dest.data(), read_ptr, copy_size);
    return dest;
}

template<size_t block_size>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<1024> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    return {
        .readable_size = storage.size(),
        .free_space = storage.free()
    };
}

template<size_t block_size>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <filesystem>
#include <utility>

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    std::error_code err;
    const auto file_size = std::filesystem::file_size(file_path, err);
    if (err) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("File error: " + err.message()));
    }
    if (file_size != sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("File size mismatch. Expected 4 bytes, got " + std::to_string(file_size)));
    }

    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    uint32_t value = 0;
    buffer.get(&value, sizeof(value));
    return hexi::endian::le_to_native(value);
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_write);
    const auto swapped = hexi::endian::native_to_le(value);
    buffer.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
const std::byte* get_read_pointer(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::byte* get_write_pointer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    return buffer.write_ptr();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>

hexi::stream_state get_stream_state(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {

    return stream.state() == hexi::stream_state::ok;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>

size_t get_stream_size(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.size();
}

bool is_stream_empty(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.size() == 0;
}

struct StreamInfo {
    hexi::stream_state state;
    size_t buffer_size;
    bool is_empty;
};

StreamInfo get_stream_state_info(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    StreamInfo info;
    info.state = stream.state();
    info.buffer_size = stream.size();
    info.is_empty = info.buffer_size == 0;
    return info;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << user_id << name;
    }
    
    void deserialise(auto& stream) {
        stream >> user_id >> name;
    }
};

void serialize_object(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const UserData& data) {
    data.serialise(writer);
}

void deserialize_object(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader, UserData& data) {
    data.serialise(reader);
}
```</answer>

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for (const std::byte& byte : buffer) {
        if (byte == value) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;
    while (value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        writer.put(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }
    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    writer.put(&byte, 1);
    return ++written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    int shift { 0 };
    T value { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        reader.get(&byte, 1);
        value += (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer;
    {
        hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
        hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
        encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    }
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);
    T decoded = decode_varint<T>(reader);
    return decoded == original_value;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string result;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(result);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    const auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    const auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    const auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.buff_size(),
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.read_limit(),
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    
    // Write packet ID as fixed 4-byte value
    buffer.write(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));
    
    // Write tags count using varint encoding
    hexi::varint_encode(buffer, packet.tags.size());
    
    // Write each tag with prefixed_varint encoding
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(buffer, tag);
    }
    
    // Write data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(buffer, packet.data);
    
    return buffer.to_vector();
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet{};
    hexi::buffer_adaptor reader(buffer);
    
    // Read packet ID
    reader.get(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));
    
    // Read tags count using varint decoding
    const auto num_tags = hexi::varint_decode<std::size_t>(reader);
    
    // Read tags with prefixed_varint decoding
    packet.tags.resize_and_overwrite(num_tags, [&](char* tag, std::size_t size) {
        hexi::prefixed_varint_decode(reader, tag, size);
        return size;
    });
    
    // Read data with prefixed_varint decoding
    packet.data.resize_and_overwrite([&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        hexi::prefixed_varint_decode(data, size);
        return size;
    });
    
    return packet;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> pool;
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        PoolObject* obj = allocator.allocate();
        obj->id = i + 1;
        obj->value = (i + 1) * 1.1;
        pool.push_back(obj);
    }
    return pool;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    // Override the virtual methods from buffer_base
    std::size_t size() const override { return data_.size(); }
    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override { return data_.empty(); }

    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    {
        hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

            buffer.resize(input_data.size());
        }
        adaptor.write(input_data.data(), input_data.size());

    std::vector<uint8_t> result(input_data.size());
    read_adaptor.read(result.data(), result.size());
    return result;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer_data);
    std::vector<uint8_t> peek_result(peek_size);
    adaptor.copy(peek_result.data(), peek_size);
    std::vector<uint8_t> read_result(peek_size);
    adaptor.read(read_result.data(), peek_size);
    return peek_result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <ranges>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstring>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<std::byte>>& chunks) {
    std::size_t total_write = 0;

    // Calculate total size required to hold all chunks
    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        total_write += chunk.size();
    }

    // Create a buffer with the calculated size
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write& buffer = *new hexi::pmc::file_buffer(total_write);

    try {
        for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
            // Check if there's enough free space before writing
            if (buffer.free() < chunk.size()) {
                HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Insufficient buffer space"));
            }

            // Write the chunk data
            buffer.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
        }
    } catch(...) {
        delete &buffer;
        HEXI_THROW();
    }

    delete &buffer;
    return total_write;
}

std::vector<std::byte> read_partial_data(const std::vector<std::byte>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    std::vector<std::byte> result;
    std::size_t remaining = buffer.size();
    const char* data = reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data());

    while (remaining > 0) {
        std::size_t read_size = chunk_size;
        
        if (read_size > remaining) {
            read_size = remaining;
        }

        // Copy the chunk to the result vector
        result.resize_and_overwrite(result.size() + read_size, [&](char* target, std::size_t size) {
            std::memcpy(target, data + (buffer.size() - remaining), size);
            return size;
        });

        remaining -= read_size;
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct Header {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
};

Header peek_header_without_reading(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    Header header;
    adaptor.copy(&header, sizeof(header));
    return header;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_then_conditionally_read(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    uint8_t first_byte = 0;

    // Peek the first byte
    adaptor.copy(&first_byte, 1);

    // Condition: if first byte is 0x01, read next 5 bytes
    if (first_byte == 0x01) {
        result.resize(5);
        adaptor.read(result.data(), 5);
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer(hexi::no_throw_t());
    hexi::stream_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    // Write message_id in big-endian
    const auto big_endian_msg_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    adaptor.put(&big_endian_msg_id, sizeof(big_endian_msg_id));

    // Write data_values count in big-endian
    const auto count = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(packet.data_values.size());
    const auto big_endian_count = hexi::endian::native_to_big(count);
    adaptor.put(&big_endian_count, sizeof(big_endian_count));

    // Write each data_value in big-endian
    for (const auto& value : packet.data_values) {
        const auto big_endian_value = hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
        adaptor.put(&big_endian_value, sizeof(big_endian_value));
    }

    // Write checksum in big-endian
    const auto big_endian_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    adaptor.put(&big_endian_checksum, sizeof(big_endian_checksum));

    return buffer.to_vector();
}

#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/pmem/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>
#include <span>
#include <cstdint>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::stream_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    // Write message_id in big-endian
    const auto big_endian_msg_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    adaptor.put(&big_endian_msg_id, sizeof(big_endian_msg_id));

    // Write data_values count in big-endian
    const auto count = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(packet.data_values.size());
    const auto big_endian_count = hexi::endian::native_to_big(count);
    adaptor.put(&big_endian_count, sizeof(big_endian_count));

    // Write each data_value in big-endian
    for (const auto& value : packet.data_values) {
        const auto swapped = hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
        adaptor.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
    }

    // Write checksum in big-endian
    const auto big_endian_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    adaptor.put(&big_endian_checksum, sizeof(big_endian_checksum));

    return buffer.to_vector();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    hexi::stream_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    // Read message_id
    std::uint32_t message_id = 0;
    adaptor.get(&message_id, sizeof(message_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);

    // Read data_values count
    std::uint32_t count = 0;
    adaptor.get(&count, sizeof(count));
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);

    // Read data_values
    packet.data_values.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        std::size_t remaining = size;
        while (remaining > 0) {
            std::uint16_t value = 0;
            adaptor.get(&value, sizeof(value));
            const auto native = hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
            memcpy(data + size - remaining, &native, sizeof(native));
            remaining -= sizeof(native);
        }
        return size;
    });

    // Read checksum
    std::uint32_t checksum = 0;
    adaptor.get(&checksum, sizeof(checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum);

    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolHeader header;
    hexi::stream_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    // Read first 4 bytes for message_id
    std::uint32_t message_id = 0;
    adaptor.get(&message_id, sizeof(message_id));
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);

    // Skip the header
    adaptor.skip(sizeof(message_id));

    return header;
}
```</answer>

void serialise(auto& stream) const {
    stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    uint32_t count = temperatures.size();
    count = hexi::endian::native_to_little(count);
    stream.put(&count, sizeof(count));
    for (float temp : temperatures) {
        float swapped = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(temp);
        stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
    }
    double swapped_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(pressure);
    stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
}

    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {

        temperatures[i] = temp;
    }
    stream.get(&pressure, sizeof(pressure));
    hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
}

But the problem statement's note says that the deserialise method uses little_to_native_inplace for the temperatures and pressure. So the code for deserialise reads each temperature, then applies the in-place conversion.

Now, the extract_sensor_info function:

But the remaining data is the temperatures and pressure. So the code would:

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    auto view = stream.view();
    const char* data = view->read_ptr();
    size_t size = view->size();
    
    // Find sensor name
    const char* pos = std::find_first_of(data, data + size, '\0');
    std::string_view sensor_name(data, pos - data);
    
    // Check if there's enough data for sensor_id
    if (pos == data + size) {
        // No null terminator, sensor name is entire data
        if (size < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
            return {0, ""};
        }
        stream.enforce_read_bounds(size - (size - sizeof(uint32_t)));
    } else {
        if ((pos - data) + sizeof(uint32_t) > size) {
            return {0, ""};
        }
        stream.enforce_read_bounds((pos - data) + sizeof(uint32_t));
    }
    
    uint32_t sensor_id = 0;
    stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    
    // Skip remaining data
    stream.skip(size - ((pos - data) + sizeof(sensor_id)));
    
    return {sensor_id, sensor_name};
}

But this code may have some issues. For example, if the sensor name is not present (i.e., the buffer starts with a null terminator), then sensor_name is empty. Also, the enforce_read_bounds is called with the required amount of data (sensor_name_len + 4). Then, after reading the sensor_id, the remaining data is skipped.

But according to the problem statement's note, the extract_sensor_info function uses view to extract the sensor name (if present), enforce_read_bounds to check for sensor_id, read sensor_id, then skip the rest.

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {

But wait, the enforce_read_bounds is called with 'required' which is the sum of the sensor name length (including if there's no null terminator) and the sensor_id's 4 bytes. Then, after reading the sensor_id, the remaining data is skipped.

But what if the sensor name is not present (i.e., the buffer starts with a null terminator)? Then sensor_name is empty, and required is 0 + 4 = 4 bytes. So enforce_read_bounds(4), then read 4 bytes for sensor_id. Then skip the rest.

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(hexi::stream& stream) const {
        stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        uint32_t count = temperatures.size();
        count = hexi::endian::native_to_little(count);
        stream.put(&count, sizeof(count));
        for (float temp : temperatures) {
            float swapped = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(temp);
            stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
        }
        double swapped_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(pressure);
        stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
    }
    
    void deserialise(hexi::stream& stream) {
        stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        uint32_t count = 0;
        stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
        count = hexi::endian::little_to_native(count);
        temperatures.resize(count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
            float temp = 0;
            stream.get(&temp, sizeof(temp));
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            temperatures[i] = temp;
        }
        stream.get(&pressure, sizeof(pressure));
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    hexi::block_allocator allocator;
    hexi::stream stream(&allocator, hexi::stream_state::ok);
    stream.serialise(data);
    return stream.buffer();
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::block_allocator allocator;
    hexi::stream stream(&allocator, hexi::stream_state::ok, buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    MeasurementData data;
    stream.serialise(data);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    auto view = stream.view();
    const char* data = view->read_ptr();
    size_t size = view->size();
    
    const char* pos = std::find_first_of(data, data + size, '\0');
    std::string_view sensor_name(data, pos - data);
    
    size_t name_len = pos - data;
    size_t required = name_len + sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    if (required > size) {
        return {0, ""};
    }
    
    stream.enforce_read_bounds(required);
    
    uint32_t sensor_id = 0;
    stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    
    stream.skip(size - (name_len + sizeof(sensor_id)));
    
    return {sensor_id, sensor_name};
}
